positioning_rules.row1: ALL melee units — tanks, fighters, juggernauts, wardens, bruisers, melee carries. If it walks up to hit, it goes Row 1.
positioning_rules.row2: ONLY used for Freljord comps — Frozen Tower center. Units BEHIND tower (Row 2 back) get Damage Amp. Units IN FRONT (Row 1) get Health bonus. Volibear and other Freljord damage units go BEHIND tower.
positioning_rules.row4: ALL ranged units — carries, mages, casters, marksmen. If it stands still and shoots or casts, it goes Row 4.

PILTOVER.lore: City of Progress — Hextech invention and the T-Hex war machine.
PILTOVER.key_trait_mechanic: Piltover builds a T-Hex that grows stronger each stage. The unit in the Pilot hex powers it — put your lowest-value unit there. 2 Piltover: Elec Overload > Blast Shields. 4 Piltover: Magnetron Coil > Gigantic Ray > Acceleration Gate. 6 Piltover: Mining Drill > Nullifier > Upgrade. 2nd T-Hex with items is an alternate win con.

comps.name: Warden T-Hex
comps.win_condition: T-Hex + 6 Piltover with Gunslinger and Warden traits. Look for Mining Drill on Stage 4 to Fast 9. Cap with Azir.
item_priority: Pilot hex = lowest value unit (Orianna or Sand Soldier)

stage_guide.stage2: Play from Cait 2 + Vi/Loris opener. Can roll for Bard if cheap via Epoch or Trade Sector.
stage_guide.stage3: Play around 4 Piltover. Do NOT chase Cait 3 — 3-star caster nerf made it not worth it.
stage_guide.stage4: Unlock T-Hex and play 6 Piltover + Gunslinger + Warden. Find Mining Drill to Fast 9. If you miss Drill, hold 6 Piltover until finding Azir.

tips: Put LOWEST value unit on your board in the pilot hex — Orianna or even Sand Soldier. Pilot scaling is not worth it.
Piltover emblem dramatically upgrades the comp.
2nd T-Hex with full items is an alternate win condition.

row4: Orianna in pilot hex (placed Row 4 near T-Hex)
positioning.notes: Standard Piltover layout. T-Hex sits bottom side. Orianna in pilot hex.

VOID.lore: The Void — alien dimension consuming Runeterra, home of the Voidborn.
VOID.key_trait_mechanic: Void mutates your strongest Void unit each round. Priority: Leeching Nucleus > Spitter Spines >> Adrenaline Modules. Iron Carapace > Husk for tanks. Rift Herald unlocked by fielding 2+ Void for 2 player combats at Level 7.

comps.name: Void Kai'Sa
comps.win_condition: Kai'Sa 2 + Rift Herald 2 with 4 Void. Cap with Ziggs and Volibear. Frontline is flexible: 4 Bruisers (default) or 4 Juggernauts for higher cap.

core_units.name: Volibear
core_units.role: Unlockable frontline — field 3400+ HP unit at Level 8

item_priority: AP Kai'Sa items OR full AD (Shojin + IE + Last Whisper)
Iron Carapace or Husk on Rift Herald
augments: Combat augments with healing item on Baron for Spitter Spines

stage_guide.stage2: Play early Void with Kog'Maw, aim for winstreak. Arcanist > Longshot as priority.
stage_guide.stage3: If winstreaking, level to 7 early and unlock Kai'Sa. Unlock Rift Herald by 3-5 and transition to 4 Void.
stage_guide.stage4: Roll for Kaisa 2 and Rift 2. Flex in Shen/Mundo as 4 Bruisers until Kobuko/Volibear. Push 9 for Ziggs.

tips: BIS Void mutation: Leeching Nucleus > Spitter Spines >> Adrenaline Modules.
AP Kai'Sa shown but full AD (Shojin + IE + Last Whisper) also viable.
4 Bruisers with Volibear is default frontline, but 4 Juggernauts with Shyvana caps higher.
Win Out augment is best for this comp — gets you to Level 10 immediately.

positioning.notes: Standard fast 8 layout. Ranged carries Row 4, melee tanks Row 1.

NOXUS.lore: Empire of Noxus — strength through conquest. Home of Atakhan, Bringer of Ruin.
NOXUS.key_trait_mechanic: Noxus summons Atakhan from the LEFT side of the board — keep Shred units on the left. LeBlanc unlocked by putting 2 items on Sion. Mel unlock: have Ambessa die with an item equipped. Sylas unlock in 16.6: sell 2-star Jarvan + 2-star Garen + 2-star Lux (much easier now). Noxus trait web is very flexible.

comps.name: Mel Fast 9
comps.win_condition: Mel + Swain as core duo. Board caps with Azir and Ryze at Level 9. Unlock LeBlanc ASAP via Sion items. Flex around Bruisers, Invokers, and Noxus.

core_units.name: Mel
core_units.role: Primary AP carry — do NOT give mana item if you want radiant farming

core_units.name: Sylas
core_units.role: Cap carry — sell 2* Jarvan + Garen + Lux to unlock

core_units.name: LeBlanc
core_units.role: Unlocked via Sion 2-item — item holder early

core_units.name: Ambessa
core_units.role: Mel unlock trigger — must die with an item

item_priority: Mel: 2 mana items — do NOT give mana item if you want orb to spin for radiant

stage_guide.stage2: Play around AP items on LeBlanc as Mel item holder. Flex Bruisers, Invokers, Noxus.
stage_guide.stage3: Maintain winstreak around LeBlanc/AP opener. Have Ambessa die with an item ASAP to unlock Mel on Level 8.
stage_guide.stage4: Roll on 8 most games to stabilize. Focus upgraded 4-cost frontline. Position Mel directly across enemy carries.

tips: Unlock LeBlanc ASAP by putting 2 items on Sion.
Core board: Mel + Swain + Darius + Sylas + Shyvana. Many other units flex.
Mel DRAINS mana from enemies — do NOT put mana item on her if you want radiant item farming.
In 16.6 Sylas unlock is much easier — always aim to unlock him.
Position Mel directly opposite enemy carries.
Noxus trait web very flexible: LeBlanc+Sion pair with Kobuko; Darius+Swain pair with Neeko/Sylas.
Board caps with Azir and Ryze on Level 9.

positioning.notes: Position Mel directly across enemy carries. Atakhan spawns LEFT — keep Shred units left side.

comps.name: Kindred Noxus Fast 9
comps.win_condition: Kindred 2 + Lucian & Senna. Position Kindred and Lucian same side to nuke tanks. Skarner + Taric flex spots.
item_priority: Rageblade AD opener slam — Draven > Aphelios > melee

stage_guide.stage2: Strong Rageblade AD opener. Pick up Bilgewater for Draven gold if possible.
stage_guide.stage3: Winstreaking: push levels. Lose streaking: roll on 7 at Stage 3-5 for Draven 2 + Bilgewater.
stage_guide.stage4: Level 9. Find Lucian & Senna and Kindred 2. Avoid entire 1-star frontline — need stall for Kindred ramp. Position Kindred/Lucian same side.

tips: Best played from winstreak with AD item slams.
Skarner + Taric flexible — can play Wardens, Volibear + Bruiser, or Azir + Shurima.
Position Kindred and Lucian on same side to nuke tanks.
Avoid rolling to true zero gold.

positioning.notes: Kindred and Lucian same side for coordinated burst.

comps.name: LeBlanc Atakhan Noxus
comps.win_condition: Darius 3 + LeBlanc 3 + Kobuko 3. Chase 10 Noxus only with 2 Noxus emblems.

core_units.name: Kobuko
core_units.role: Unlockable frontline — 6 Bruiser/Yordle/Invoker star levels at L6+

stage_guide.stage2: Strong openers around LeBlanc and Noxus. Slam AD melee items until Darius.
stage_guide.stage3: Level 6, play 5 Noxus ASAP. Extra Bruisers help Kobuko unlock.
stage_guide.stage4: Roll 3-star on Level 7. Unlock Mel via Ambessa. On 8, play 7 Noxus or cut to 5-costs.

tips: Unlock LeBlanc ASAP — 2 items on Sion.
Chase 10 Noxus only with 2 Noxus emblems.
Atakhan spawns LEFT — keep Shred units on left side.
Best chance to reach 10 is playing around Draven for gold.

positioning.notes: Keep Shred units left for Atakhan.

IONIA.lore: Spirit Realm — land of balance and the mystical bond between Yasuo and Yone.
IONIA.key_trait_mechanic: Ionia Paths change each game. 16.6 priority: Spirits > Transcendence > Blades > Enlightened > Prosperity. KEY 16.6 CHANGE: You do NOT need Yasuo 3-star to unlock Yone. Never waste gold on Yasuo 3. Sett unlock: field only 1 unit in front 2 rows at Level 8. Kennen unlock: 5 star levels in Yordle/Ionia/Defender at Level 5+.

comps.name: Ionia Yone (IYoneia)
comps.win_condition: Yone 2 as primary carry. Never sell Yasuo. End game move items to Aatrox/Sylas. Cap with Sett and go Level 9.

core_units.name: Yone
items: Rageblade or QSS or Edge of Night

core_units.name: Yasuo
core_units.role: Blade Brothers enabler for Yone — NEVER SELL

core_units.name: Sett
core_units.role: Unlockable frontline (solo front 2 rows at L8)

item_priority: Titan's Resolve on Yone — highest priority, CC immunity + stats

stage_guide.stage2: Winstreak with Ahri and upgraded Ionia or AD Melee. If lots of econ, consider Bard. NEVER sell Yasuo.
stage_guide.stage3: Add more Ionia. Roll on 6 if key pairs available. Unlock Yone on 7 ASAP.
stage_guide.stage4: Level 8, roll for Yone 2, unlock Sett (solo front 2 rows). Try to push 9. Move items to Aatrox/Sylas.

tips: 16.6 KEY CHANGE: You do NOT need Yasuo 3-star to unlock Yone. Do not waste gold.
Titan's Resolve is Yone's best item — CC immunity and both relevant stats.
Path of Spirits is best Ionia Path in 16.6.
Sett unlock: field only 1 unit in front 2 rows for 1 turn at Level 8 — very simple.
After 16.6, Transcendence better for reroll version.

comps.name: Ahri Yone Reroll
comps.win_condition: Ahri 3 + Kennen 3. Once hit, go 8 and play 7 Ionia + Neeko. Yone is a bonus unlock, not the primary target.

stage_guide.stage2: Winstreak with Ahri and upgraded Ionia.
stage_guide.stage3: Level 7 on 3-5, roll for Ahri/Kennen/Yasuo. Stop rolling once Yone unlocked.
stage_guide.stage4: Stay on 7. Roll for Ahri 3 and Kennen 3. Once hit, go 8 and play 7 Ionia + Neeko.

tips: 3-cost reroll OR Fast 8 (Ahri 2, Kennen 2, push to 9) are both viable.
Only go for Yasuo 3 if highrolling copies AND items.
Bard is nice for comp but not needed if can't fit 7 Ionia + Neeko on 7.

SHADOW_ISLES.lore: The Harrowed — realm of undead and black mist. Viego the Ruined King rules here.
SHADOW_ISLES.key_trait_mechanic: Shadow Isles builds soul stacks through combat. Note: Kindred and Fiddlesticks are NOT Shadow Isles trait units — don't count on them for the trait.

comps.name: Warden Kalista
comps.win_condition: Kalista 2 + Viego board. Braum/warden frontline. Use most legendaries on Level 9. Only play with early Viego 2.

stage_guide.stage2: Farm souls with Shadow Isles. Play around Viego as early carry.
stage_guide.stage3: Level to 7-8, stabilize with Shadow Isles frontline.
stage_guide.stage4: Fast 8 at 4-2. Find Kalista 2, Braum 2, go 9 for legendaries.

tips: Only play when you find early Viego 2.
Kindred and Fiddlesticks are NOT Shadow Isles — don't count them for trait.
This comp can use most legendaries on Level 9.
Beginner-friendly.

IXTAL.lore: Hidden jungle nation of Ixtal — elemental magic and quests that reward Sunshards.
IXTAL.key_trait_mechanic: Ixtal quests reward Sunshards throughout the game. 500 cumulative Sunshards across ALL cashouts unlocks Brock (7-cost). Brock is often bait unless VERY far ahead. Nidalee unlock: field 2-star Neeko with 3 items at Level 7. Skarner unlock: field a Marksman or Caster with a Chain Vest item at Level 7.

comps.name: Sandy Brock (Ixtal Fast 9)
comps.win_condition: Complete Ixtal quests for Sunshards/cashouts, flex into strongest board post-cashout. Ixtal Ryze is one of the highest caps in the game — Ixtal trait gives every single region spell.

stage_guide.stage2: Play around Neeko and AP item holders. Orianna and Ahri strong early. No need to rush 3 Ixtal since Brock is rarely hit.
stage_guide.stage3: If winstreaking: level to 7 early, unlock Nidalee and Skarner. Tech in 3 Ixtal and begin questing.
stage_guide.stage4: Roll for Nidalee 2, Skarner 2, preferred AP duo. Once stable, go 9 for 5-costs. Cap with Sylas.

tips: Brock is often bait — only chase if VERY far ahead with Sunshards.
EXPERIMENTAL: Trap Neeko in a corner for max Nidalee Huntress passive uptime.
Backline AP fully flexible: Disruptor Mel / Azir / Seraphine / Invoker Zilean + Freljord / Ryze.
Sunshards accumulate across ALL cashouts — don't need 500 in one run.
Ixtal Ryze extremely powerful — gains every region spell.
Generally only play from spots where you have Ixtal on 2-1.
Have at least 1 Chain item by Level 7 for Skarner unlock.

positioning.notes: Trap Neeko in corner (experimental). Backline fully flexible post-cashout.

SHURIMA.lore: Desert empire reborn — ancient magic, Azir's ascended warriors, and Shurima quests.
SHURIMA.key_trait_mechanic: Shurima rewards winning combats with Azir (rolling for loot). Sylas unlock in 16.6: sell 2-star Jarvan + 2-star Garen + 2-star Lux — made MUCH EASIER this patch. Shurima Ryze: CCs and potentially drops loot. Getting Azir fast on Level 9 is very important.

comps.name: Arcanist Annie Sylas
comps.win_condition: Annie 2 + Tibbers + Sylas 2 on Level 9. Annie burns/wounds the entire battlefield. Sylas rotates Jarvan/Garen/Lux spells. Unlock Sylas by selling 2-star Jarvan + 2-star Garen + 2-star Lux.

core_units.name: Annie
core_units.role: Primary AP carry — MUST have 2 mana items minimum

item_priority: 2 mana items on Annie MINIMUM — damage items too slow

stage_guide.stage2: Winstreak AP opener — Demacia preferred but any Invoker start works. Slam mana items for Annie later.
stage_guide.stage3: Econ heavily. Play around 3-cost carries: Ahri, LeBlanc, Zoe. If winstreaking, can trade HP end of Stage 3-4 to reach 9.
stage_guide.stage4: Unlock Galio on 8 (8 Demacia star levels). Level 9 and unlock Sylas. Prioritize strong upgraded tank until Tibbers 2 online.

tips: Sylas unlock: sell 2-star Jarvan + 2-star Garen + 2-star Lux. 16.6 made this much easier.
Annie MUST have minimum 2 mana items — she needs to get her first cast off.
Tibbers is incredibly tanky — worth full itemization.
Best from Yordle opener — 6 Yordle rolls/gold help hit Jarvan/Garen/Lux 2-stars.
NOT a comp for every game — requires ton of gold and econ augments.
Without Annie comp is very difficult — she is both frontline AND backline.
Lucian slot flexible: Taric, Skarner, Fiddlesticks all viable.

positioning.notes: Tibbers acts as main melee frontline. Annie stays backline.

comps.name: Demacia Ryze Sett
comps.win_condition: Level 9 Ryze + Sett. Unlock Galio from Demacia opener. Shurima Ryze buff: CCs and drops loot. Board caps with Xerath/Azir for Shurima trait.

core_units.name: Sett
core_units.role: Melee carry (Level 8 unlock — solo front 2 rows)

core_units.name: Poppy
core_units.role: Demacia frontline — Poppy 1 with Juggernaut > Jarvan 2 early

core_units.name: Kennen
core_units.role: Ionia/Yordle/Defender unlock (5 star levels at L5+)

core_units.name: Galio
core_units.role: Unlocked via 8 Demacia star levels at L8 — contributes from bench

core_units.name: Kobuko
core_units.role: Unlockable frontline — 6 Bruiser/Yordle/Invoker star levels at L6+

augments: Invoker Ryze or Disruptor Ryze emblems are best spatulas

stage_guide.stage2: Strong AP opener. Econ generating Ionia paths if possible. Can also play from Ionia Ahri + AP items.
stage_guide.stage3: Unlock Kennen and Kobuko. Aggressively hold Demacian star levels for Galio unlock.
stage_guide.stage4: Fast 8 at 4-2, unlock Galio (8 Demacia star levels). Stabilize around 5 Demacia, go 9 for Ryze. Unlock Volibear, Sett, Galio this stage.

tips: 16.6 Kennen/Galio unlock conditions changed — much easier now.
Ryze needs 3 region traits at Level 9. Galio needs 8 Demacia star levels at Level 8.
Shurima Ryze is best Ryze buff — CCs and drops loot.
Almost every good Ryze board uses Kobuko + Kennen package.
Sett unlock: field only 1 unit in front 2 rows for 1 turn at Level 8.
Volibear unlock: field a unit with 3400+ HP at Level 8.
Ideally play from early Demacia winstreak or Ionia Ahri AP start.

positioning.notes: All melee carries Row 1. Ryze stays backline.

FRELJORD.lore: The Frozen North — Freljord summons a Frozen Tower with unique positional buffs.
FRELJORD.key_trait_mechanic: CRITICAL TOWER POSITIONING: Tower spawns center Row 2. Units BEHIND tower (back of Row 2) get DAMAGE AMP — put damage dealers like Volibear here. Units IN FRONT of tower (Row 1) get HEALTH bonus — put tanks like Braum here. Freljordians get 150% more of both effects. Volibear unlock: field a unit with 3800+ HP at Level 8.

comps.name: Freljord Invokers / LiSserafine
comps.win_condition: Lissandra + Seraphine AP dual carry. Volibear behind tower for Damage Amp. Cap with Ryze and Invoker augments. Look for Invoker Seraphine or Disruptor Lissandra emblem.

core_units.name: Lissandra
core_units.role: AP utility carry — Disruptor Lissandra emblem premium

core_units.name: Braum
core_units.role: Freljord frontline — IN FRONT of tower (Health bonus)

core_units.name: Volibear
core_units.role: BEHIND tower for Damage Amp — melee damage dealer

item_priority: Seraphine AP items — spell crit and damage

stage_guide.stage2: AP opener, slam AP/mana items on Seraphine/Lissandra.
stage_guide.stage3: Continue tempo. Take item augments. Find belts for Volibear unlock.
stage_guide.stage4: Get to Level 9. Unlock Ryze. Volibear behind tower, Braum in front.

tips: TOWER POSITIONING CRITICAL: Braum IN FRONT of tower (Row 1) for Health. Volibear BEHIND tower (Row 2 back) for Damage Amp.
Prioritize Seraphine over Lissandra for items.
Need at least 1 item augment to find success.
Voli 2 > Renek 2 > Voli 1 > Renek 1, unless 3 Shurima (then Renek 2 > Voli 2).
Invoker Seraphine or Disruptor Lissandra emblem are premium spatula targets.

row1: Sejuani — IN FRONT of tower for Health
row2_behind_tower: Volibear — BEHIND tower for Damage Amp
positioning.notes: CRITICAL: Tower center Row 2. Tanks FRONT of tower. Volibear BEHIND tower.

DEMACIA.lore: Kingdom of Demacia — justice and military might. Galio is unlockable and contributes to Demacia trait from bench.
DEMACIA.key_trait_mechanic: Galio: field 8 star levels of Demacia at Level 8 — sits on bench without taking a unit slot, giving you 10 total units. 16.6 changes made Kennen/Galio unlock much easier. Poppy unlock: field a Demacian or Yordle with 2 items in combat. Vayne becoming a very common Demacia opener.

comps.name: Demacia Lux AP Invoker
comps.win_condition: Lux as primary carry + AP Invoker duo (Orianna → Lissandra → Zilean). Garen full tank. Galio unlocked on 8. Go 9 for Zilean/5-costs.

core_units.name: Garen
core_units.role: Main tank — TRUE tank items only, no Sunfire/Spark

core_units.name: Orianna
core_units.role: AP Invoker duo carry / item holder

core_units.name: Galio
core_units.role: Unlocked via 8 Demacia star levels at L8 — contributes from bench

item_priority: TRUE tank items on Garen — avoid Sunfire/Spark
Piltover synergy: Orianna + Vi (Blast Shield > Continuum Cogs)

stage_guide.stage2: Winstreak around upgraded Demacia. Poppy 1 with Juggernaut > Jarvan 2 is great early.
stage_guide.stage3: Add more Demacians. Most common: 5 Demacia + 2 Invoker. Look for Piltover with Orianna + Vi.
stage_guide.stage4: Fast 8 at 4-2. Unlock Galio ASAP (8 Demacia star levels). Do not finish rolling until Galio + upgraded frontline. Once stable, go 9 for Zilean/5-costs.

tips: Lux primary carry — look for Invoker duo: Orianna → Lissandra → Zilean.
Can also target Ziggs late game.
Demacia emblem: swap Xin Zhao/Poppy for frontline (Shyvana/Swain).
Galio contributes Demacia from bench — doesn't take a unit slot. 10 total units.
Beginner-friendly comp.

positioning.notes: Galio on bench contributes trait without occupying board slot.

comps.name: Demacia Sona Reroll
comps.win_condition: Sona 3-star as primary carry with Garen full tank. Unlock Galio on 8. Drop to 5 Demacia for high-value 4/5-costs.

core_units.name: Garen
core_units.role: Main tank — TRUE tank items, no Sunfire/Spark

core_units.name: Galio
core_units.role: Unlockable bench unit — 8 Demacia star levels at L8

item_priority: Sona items important — Archangel's + Blue Buff
Hold Vaynes for Galio unlock — don't invest items

stage_guide.stage2: Slow roll for Sona 3-star. Jarvan 3 is bonus.
stage_guide.stage3: Hold Vaynes for Galio — don't itemize. Slow roll on 6.
stage_guide.stage4: Unlock Galio ASAP. Garen full tank items online. Lux holds leftover AP. Drop from 7 Demacia for high-value 4/5-costs.

tips: Sona items important but also prioritize TRUE tank items on Garen.
Invoker slot is flexible.
Strong with Demacia emblem — drop Xin Zhao.
Beginner-friendly.

BILGEWATER.lore: Port of Bilgewater — Silver Serpents from the Black Market grant bonus stats and special loot.
BILGEWATER.key_trait_mechanic: Each player combat: gain Silver Serpents, plus 1 per Bilgewater takedown. Spend in Black Market: 2-star units > Captain's Brew > $15 stats. Graves unlock: field Twisted Fate holding an item at Level 6 (Stage 1 PvE counts).

comps.name: Bilgewater Tahm Kench MF (Max Cap)
comps.win_condition: Rush 7 Bilgewater ASAP for Serpents, then drop to 5/3 Bilgewater late for higher-value units. Win condition is overwhelming item advantage from Serpents.

core_units.name: Tahm Kench
core_units.role: Frontline tank — feed $1 units only until 2-star

core_units.name: Twisted Fate
core_units.role: Item holder early / Graves unlock vehicle

core_units.name: Illaoi
core_units.role: Frontline tank — frontline items strong on Illaoi 2

stage_guide.stage2: Slam everything for winstreak. Unlock Graves early (TF with item). Frontline items strong on Illaoi 2.
stage_guide.stage3: Play 5 Bilgewater ASAP. Serpents: 2-star units > Captain's Brew > $15 stats. OK to Restock on 5 Bilge for MF copy.
stage_guide.stage4: Roll on Level 8 for Miss Fortune. Stay 7 Bilgewater while ahead. Feed TK $1 units until 2-star. Once losing, transition out of 7 Bilge into 4/5-cost value units.

tips: PLAY FROM STRONG WINSTREAK OPENER ONLY.
Rush 7 Bilgewater for Serpents, drop late game for higher value.
DO NOT over-greed BIS items — overwhelming item advantage is the win condition.
Unlock Graves on Stage 1 by having TF hold an item.
Once you start losing, quickly transition to stronger late-game units.

ZAUN.lore: Undercity of Zaun — Shimmer-infused rogues and machines.
ZAUN.key_trait_mechanic: Zaun: Zaunites explode into Shimmer on death, dealing % of their max health as magic damage to nearby enemies. Singed unlock: lose 35 Player Health and field 4 unique Zaunites or Juggernauts (happens naturally on lose streak). Warwick unlock: field Jinx AND Vi both holding an item at Level 7. 5+ Zaun is powerful but without emblem augments the comp is C tier.

comps.name: Zaunara (Warwick Flex Fast 8)
comps.win_condition: Warwick 2 + 5 Zaun + Singed. Cap on Level 9 with Shyvana + Kindred + Lucian & Senna. Emblem augments (Zaun/Gunslinger/Juggernaut) make this comp shine.

core_units.name: Jinx
core_units.role: AD carry — items FIRST before Warwick items

core_units.name: Lucian & Senna
core_units.role: Level 9 cap carry — Jinx 2 holds items until Kindred 2

early_units: Briar 2 / Qiyana 2 winstreak OR lose streak for Singed
augments: Emblem augments very strong — without them this is C tier

stage_guide.stage2: Winstreak with Zaun Vi/Briar/Qiyana opener OR lose streak for Singed. Jinx items first, Warwick second.
stage_guide.stage3: Always itemize Jinx. Winstreaking: level early to unlock Warwick. Lose streaking: roll on 7 for Jinx/Vi/Mundo upgrades.
stage_guide.stage4: Level 8 at 4-2. Find Warwick 2, 5 Zaun, upgraded tank (Wukong 2 > Mundo 2). Level 9: Ziggs over Blitz, add Shyvana with items.

tips: Always place main tank adjacent to Warwick — protects him from enemy carries.
Jinx 2 carries backline items until Kindred 2.
Final 3 Level 9 5-costs: Shyvana + Kindred + Lucian & Senna — always target these.
3 flex slots on Level 9: 2 Zaun units + 1 linking unit (Wukong/Swain/Seraphine/Garen/Neeko).
Zaun emblem: drop a dead Zaun unit, play Fiddlesticks/Taric instead.
Warwick unlock: field Jinx AND Vi both holding an item at Level 7.
Singed unlock: lose 35 HP + field 4 unique Zaunites or Juggernauts — happens naturally on lose streak.

positioning.notes: Main tank always adjacent to Warwick for protection.
